title: BEM-650 final report
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return {}
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {}

def exists(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.exists() and p.stat().st_size>0

items={
 'BEM-646 write-channel smoke':'governance/state/bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.json',
 'BEM-648 completion plan':'governance/state/bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour.json',
 'BEM-649 controls':'governance/state/bem649_execute_completion_controls.json',
 'Internal auditor verdict':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/reports/bem649_internal_auditor_verdict.json',
 'Executor result':'governance/internal_contour/executor/reports/bem649_executor_completion_result.json',
 'Final acceptance BEM-633':'governance/state/bem633_final_acceptance_internal_contour_and_auditor_sync.json',
 'Role communication canon':'governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md',
 'Auditor interaction canon':'governance/protocols/INTERNAL_EXTERNAL_AUDITOR_INTERACTION_CANON.md',
 'Evidence canon':'governance/protocols/ROLE_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE_CANON.md',
 'Architecture lint':'governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json',
 'Provider closure':'governance/state/bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json'
}
loaded={k:load(v) for k,v in items.items()}
status_map={k:{'path':v,'exists':exists(v),'status':loaded[k].get('status') if isinstance(loaded[k],dict) else None} for k,v in items.items()}
controls=load('governance/state/bem649_execute_completion_controls.json')
watch=controls.get('operational_watch',[]) if isinstance(controls,dict) else []
all_required=all(x['exists'] for x in status_map.values()) and controls.get('status')=='pass'
status='completed' if all_required else 'incomplete'
blocker=None if all_required else {'code':'FINAL_COMPLETION_REPORT_INCOMPLETE','status_map':status_map}

report_obj={'schema_version':'final_completion_report_internal_contour.v1','bem':'BEM-650','status':status,'stage':{'done':10,'total':10,'percent':100},'roadmap':{'done':10,'total':10,'percent':100},'status_map':status_map,'operational_watch':watch,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:27 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem650_final_completion_report_internal_contour.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(report_obj,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

md=[]
md.append('# BEM-650 | Final Completion Report | Internal Contour')
md.append('')
md.append('Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:27 (UTC+3)')
md.append('')
md.append('## Status')
md.append(status)
md.append('')
md.append('## What was completed')
md.append('- Completion plan passed through Curator, Role Orchestrator, Internal Task Registry, Analyst, Internal Auditor, Executor.')
md.append('- Mandatory controls C1-C7 executed and passed.')
md.append('- Internal Auditor verdict produced.')
md.append('- Executor result produced.')
md.append('- Write-channel restored and smoke-tested.')
md.append('- Mailbox boundary and auditor sync canon installed.')
md.append('- Deno documented as transport adapter, not internal executor role.')
md.append('')
md.append('## Evidence map')
for name,data in status_map.items():
    md.append('- '+name+': '+('PASS' if data['exists'] else 'MISSING')+' | '+data['path']+' | status='+str(data['status']))
md.append('')
md.append('## Operational watch')
md.append('null' if not watch else json.dumps(watch,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))
md.append('')
md.append('## Blocker')
md.append('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))
report=reports/'bem650_final_completion_report_internal_contour.md'
report.write_text(sep.join(md)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem650_final_completion_report_internal_contour','cycle_id':'bem650-final-completion-report-internal-contour','source':'gpt_final_monitor','status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'operational_watch':watch,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:27 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem650_final_completion_report_internal_contour']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'operational_watch':watch,'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['internal_contour_development_completion']='completed' if status=='completed' else 'incomplete'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:27 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem650_final_completion_report_internal_contour.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-650 '+status.upper()+': final completion report created.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created final completion report for internal contour task with evidence map and operational watch')
"""
No issue comments.
